title: Follow and implement an established work plan
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Follow and implement an established work plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare for work

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work activities and requirements from work schedules and/or supervisory staff.

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
